response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the video as a concert snippet of Ninomae Ina'nis at 'Drawn to Dawn'. 
2. Used on-screen text ('TAKO∞TAKOVER') to identify the song title.
3. Search query used: 'Ninomae Ina'nis "TAKO∞TAKOVER" Japanese and English lyrics'. 
4. Received lyrics from Lyrical Nonsense and Genius. 
5. Structured the video into two scenes: the crowd/intro and the song performance.
response.global_summary: This video segment shows a concert performance by VTuber Ninomae Ina'nis at the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert. It features an opening crowd buildup, followed by the performance of her original song 'TAKO∞TAKOVER'.

scenes.description: The video starts with an audience in a dark concert hall waving light sticks, followed by a logo appearing on the screen.
Ninomae Ina'nis performs her song 'TAKO∞TAKOVER' on stage while the audience continues to wave light sticks.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ひっくりかえして 丸くして (Nice)
コロコロまわして 焦がさずに (いいね！)
外はカリっと 中ふわふわ
できたらソースで さあいただき！
Enlightened by the powers that be
The ruler of a world run on INAsanity
It’s clear to me they still can’t see
I’m just a normal girl
Empowered by the ancient one's call
We’re gonna be pun-stoppable, we’re not a cult
Nonsensical and nautical
Adventures lie in wait
Let's talk about the future to be
Rewriting all of history in urgency
With cookies as our currency
This place can finally heal
Insubordination won't fly
Or else I'm making takoyaki
